author: Tim Rice <tim.j.rice@hackrange.com>
name: admin_exposure
summary: Validates 'Administrative interface exposed' findings: distinguishes public exposure / authenticated-user area / web-server-gated path / misclassified marketing page. Uses identity reflection (hashed username) to confirm authenticated rendering.

args.--cookie: Cookie header sent on the authenticated baseline. The anonymous baseline always strips cookies regardless of this value.
args.--auth-username: Username the assessment authenticated as. Used to detect identity reflection in the response body. Never echoed back; only a 16-hex SHA-256 fingerprint is stored in evidence.
args.--baseline-404: Optional URL guaranteed to 404 on this host, used as the negative-control fingerprint. If omitted, the probe synthesizes one.
